trivia_bullets.text: Eldrazi Skyspawner carries the subtype 'Eldrazi Drone' (verified via Scryfall API type_line: 'Creature — Eldrazi Drone'). The Drone subtype designates the servant class of the Eldrazi — smaller creatures that swarm Zendikar ahead of the titans, distinct from Processors (which consume exiled cards).

The Skyspawner's ETB trigger creates a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion token (sacrifice for {C} mana). This Scion-generating pattern was a key BFZ design axis: Scions accelerated mana toward large Eldrazi spells and contributed to the 'colorlessness matters' mechanical theme. Scryfall's all_parts field lists the Eldrazi Scion token as an official combo-piece relationship to this card.

Eldrazi Skyspawner is legal in Pauper (confirmed via Scryfall legalities). It has seen consistent play in Pauper Eldrazi lists — MTGDecks.net lists it in Temur Control and Izzet Skred pauper builds as of March 2026. EDHREC rank 11,532 is notably higher than most BFZ commons, reflecting cross-format utility. At {2}{U} it provides a 2/1 flier plus a Scion that can ramp or chump the following turn.

Community sentiment from MTGSalvation Pauper Eldrazi forum thread: Skyspawner was discussed as a foundational piece of the BFZ-era Pauper Eldrazi shell, valued for combining the evasion body (flies over ground blockers) with the Scion token (ramps or chump-blocks). Rated the most consistently-played BFZ Eldrazi common in the format by that community.
sources: MTGSalvation forums: 'Eldrazi — MTGO Pauper' thread (via WebSearch snippet)
